patterns.name: Unauthorized privileged action
patterns.countermeasure: Restrict privileged functions with role-based access control or onlyOwner.
patterns.security_property: Only authorized actors can execute privileged operations.
patterns.test_objective: Verify that unauthorized callers cannot execute privileged functions.

patterns.name: Approval race condition
patterns.countermeasure: Use allowance increase/decrease functions or require resetting allowance to zero before changing it.
patterns.security_property: Allowance updates must not enable a spender to consume both old and new allowances.
patterns.test_objective: Verify that allowance changes cannot be exploited through front-running.

patterns.name: Reentrancy during value transfer
patterns.countermeasure: Apply checks-effects-interactions and/or a reentrancy guard.
patterns.security_property: State must be updated before external calls that may transfer control.
patterns.test_objective: Verify that a malicious receiver cannot re-enter and consume state twice.

patterns.name: Balance or supply invariant violation
patterns.countermeasure: Check preconditions and preserve balance and total-supply invariants after every state transition.
patterns.security_property: Token transfers must preserve accounting invariants.
patterns.test_objective: Verify that transfers and mint/burn operations preserve expected token accounting.
